testcase.name: graphql health checks > an introspection message sent to the websocket channel > should return the supported graphql schema
graphql health checks > an introspection message sent to the websocket channel > should return an error, given the depth of the query is > 15
graphql health checks > an introspection request sent to the http channel > should return the supported graphql schema
graphql health checks > an introspection request sent to the http channel > should return an error, given the depth of the query is > 15
GraphQL Schema Stability Check > should not change the schema unexpectedly
graphql schema deprecations > RegularTransaction.merkleTreeRoot > should be marked deprecated with reason "Use zswapMerkleTreeRoot instead"
graphql schema deprecations > RegularTransaction.startIndex > should be marked deprecated with reason "Use zswapStartIndex instead"
graphql schema deprecations > RegularTransaction.endIndex > should be marked deprecated with reason "Use zswapEndIndex instead"
graphql schema deprecations > RelevantTransaction.collapsedMerkleTree > should be marked deprecated with reason "Use zswapCollapsedUpdate instead"
graphql schema deprecations > ShieldedTransactionsProgress.highestEndIndex > should be marked deprecated with reason "Use highestZswapEndIndex instead"
graphql schema deprecations > ShieldedTransactionsProgress.highestCheckedEndIndex > should be marked deprecated with reason "Use highestCheckedZswapEndIndex instead"
graphql schema deprecations > ShieldedTransactionsProgress.highestRelevantEndIndex > should be marked deprecated with reason "Use highestRelevantZswapEndIndex instead"
graphql schema deprecations > RegularTransaction.fees > should be marked deprecated with reason "Use fee instead"
graphql schema deprecations > TransactionFees.estimatedFees > should be marked deprecated with reason "Use paidFees instead"
service health checks > a request to the /ready endpoint > should return a 200 status code OK
service health checks > a request to an unrecognised path /api/v3/__regression_unknown_path > should not 308 to a version-double-prefixed Location
service health checks > a request to an unrecognised path /api/v3/__regression_unknown_path > should terminate when redirects are followed
service health checks > a request to an unrecognised path /api/v4/__regression_unknown_path > should not 308 to a version-double-prefixed Location
service health checks > a request to an unrecognised path /api/v4/__regression_unknown_path > should terminate when redirects are followed
